title: Gluttony gains modifier for destroyed magic

card.rawText: When summoned, destroy all magic cards on the field. For each magic card destroyed, add +1 Modifier to this card. This card is unaffected by other Hit Modifier and Hit Dice Roll increases.

effect.value: +1 Modifier for each magic card destroyed

plan.title: Gluttony gains modifier for destroyed magic
plan.summary: Summon Gluttony while two magic cards are on the field and verify it gains +1 Modifier for each destroyed magic card.

notes: Pre-place Ball and Chain and Common Sword as field magic before Gluttony is summoned.
Gluttony has base Modifier 0, so two destroyed magic cards should produce effective Modifier 2.

steps: Read Gluttony's effective Modifier after two field magic cards are destroyed.

expectedAssertions.label: Gluttony is summoned as primary creature
Ball and Chain was removed from field
Common Sword was removed from field
Gluttony Modifier gained one per destroyed magic card

manualVerification: Confirm the Modifier increase scales with the number of magic cards actually destroyed.
riskNotes: This fixture isolates the numeric follow-up clause after Gluttony's on-summon field wipe.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Gluttony's +1 Modifier per destroyed magic card.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
